description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized Chevrolet SUV finished in a glossy red paint with chrome accents and a panoramic sunroof. The vehicle features a prominent front grille with the Chevrolet bowtie emblem, sleek LED headlights, and sculpted body lines that enhance its aerodynamic profile. The side view reveals four passenger doors, flush door handles, and dark-tinted windows, while the roof is equipped with silver roof rails for added utility. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys with a dark metallic finish, complementing the overall sporty appearance. The rear of the SUV displays wraparound taillights, a rear windshield wiper, and a subtle roof spoiler. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to be upholstered in light tan leather with a modern dashboard layout.
description: A glossy red Chevrolet SUV with chrome accents, panoramic sunroof, and multi-spoke alloy wheels. Features include four doors, tinted windows, and a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing wraparound taillights, Chevrolet emblem, rear windshield wiper, and roof spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, flush handles, alloy wheels, and roof rails.
description_view_2: Front view with prominent grille, Chevrolet badge, LED headlights, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to left, showing door configuration, alloy wheels, and roof rails.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy wheels with a dark metallic finish
